channel.title: Youtube on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Youtube on smpaget blog

item.title: Fleet Foxes - "White Winter Hymnal"
item.description: “I was following the pack all swallowed in their coats with scarves of red tied ’round their throats to keep their little heads from fallin’ in the snow And I turned ’round and there you go And, Michael, you would fall and turn the white snow red as strawberries in the summertime” seemed appropriate on my itunes just there

item.title: God Sex & Virgin Sacrifice
item.description: My first video is up on Youtube. It is called Sex God and Virgin Scrifice. it is an adaptation of the story in Genesis 18 & 19. Done in the Richscot productions style. Looks not to bad actually
